scope: Focused positive tid sweep summary across the 428-434 and 533-540 high-signal bands
verdict: Within the focused high-signal bands, API1 still has only one true positive content branch on `tid=431`, but `tid=537` now stands out as a separate `success_shell_without_sample` branch rather than an ordinary failure.
Within the same focused bands, API2 has confirmed positive branches on both `tid=535` and `tid=540` in XML and JSONP wrappers.

The 53x region is now clearly heterogeneous rather than a uniform error desert: `534` is a forbidden-external branch, `535/540` are real positives on API2 but `key all illegal` on API1, and `537` splits into `key all illegal` on API2 versus `success shell without sample` on API1.
